programmes.show_description: Get your fix of all the best new releases in one handy playlist.
Thundercat in conversation with Matt Everitt, Arlo Parks talks to Lauren Laverne and The Twilight Sad on an emotional return with their brilliant LP It's the Long Goodbye.
Soundtrack the early hours with back-to-back music, plus exclusive BBC sessions.
6 Music goes back to the 90s!
6 Music goes back to the 00s!
Chris Hawkins takes you through 30 minutes of remixed, re-versioned and re-imagined tracks. Featuring Tomora, Robyn, Fontaines D.C., The Itch and more.
Amy Lamé has all the best new music to get you through to your weekend. Get in touch with your Friday shouts, mentions and requests. WhatsApp 03700 100 600 or text 64046.
Deb Grant sits in with wonderful music to start your day, including the Cloudbusting mix to banish the grey skies.
Avalon Emerson is in conversation with Lauren around new album, Written into Changes.
The weekend is basically here, so Chris is giving YOU permission to start the party early... That's right, let's Down Tools with LOADS of amazing tunes to get us going.
It's Friday, so Huw is out to prove that any song sounds better when it's played on 6 Music by Huw Stephens - so let us know what you want to hear.

programmes.show_name: The People's Party with Femi Koleoso
programmes.show_description: Femi restores your faith with a soulful show full of gospel sounds. The London-born Christian rapper Guvna B shares his Friday Vibe, plus Femi is in the mix for the last half hour.
Nathan plays back-to-back indie bangers by Future Islands, Metronomy and The Kills!
Nathan and Emily's epic DJ set at the Indie Forever Club night, from the 6 Music Festival!

programmes.show_name: The 6 Mix with Mary Anne Hobbs
programmes.show_description: Ipswich-based producer and DJ Digital takes over the 6 Music Mix to celebrate three decades of the iconic Drum & Bass label Metalheadz.
A wall-to-wall celebration of Rave's most Iconic Piano Riffs. Uplifting anthems from N-Joi, Bizarre Inc., Strike, The Prodigy and plenty more.
6 Music takes you to the dark side with the finest goth, electronic and dark pop music, with Prince, The March Violets, Imogen Heap, Yeule, Scheer and more.
Louise shares her favourite tracks for soothing a broken heart!
Russell shares his favourite dance tracks, guaranteed to get people on their feet!
Immerse yourself in this two-hour selection of dreamy and summery ambient sounds to help you concentrate on your goals.
Need to slow things down? Afrodeutsche brings the mellow Saturday flow you need to really hit that deeply relaxing vibe.
Mark and Stuart present a feast of music and chat plus Melody Prochet AKA Melody's Echo Chamber shares her First, Last and Everything and chats about her latest album and tour.
Beth Ditto kicks off her first Saturday morning show on 6!
Zakia sits in with alternative RnB, global club sounds and leftfield electronica.
Joining the musical dots, soul, hip-hop, house, Afro, Latin, electronica, jazz and beyond.

programmes.show_name: The Stuart Maconie Funk and Soul Show
programmes.show_description: The best in funk and soul with Stuart Maconie sitting in.
Don's Saturday night selections cross time, space and genre. This weekend, his got culture clash cuts by The Congos, Kim Gordon, Vibronics, Happy Mondays and Nightmares On Wax.
SHERELLE's back for another Saturday night, playing brilliantly leftfield music from across the rave continuum! Featuring new delights from foodman, FlyLo, Rosa Pistola and more.
